brief_notes: Exceptional numerical accuracy across the board. Every parameter from the extraction is faithfully reproduced: network architecture (N=5000, NE=4000, NI=1000, p=0.2, C=10^3), all firing rates (5.2/20, 5.5/21, 7.8/26, 15/42 Hz), oscillation frequencies (50/58/55 Hz), correlation peaks (+/-18/+/-20 ms), neuron pair counts (978/368), DPX task design (69%/31%, timing), all synaptic time constants, membrane parameters (Cm, gm, tau_rp), NMDAR Mg2+ block parameters, electrode spacing (400-1400 um), and PCP dosage. Writing quality is notably strong with sophisticated theoretical exposition. Comprehensive parameter table consolidates all values effectively. Overall excludes figures per rubric.
